PowerShell(Write-Output "=== Node.js ==="; \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source\) -or "NOT FOUND"; node --version 2>$null; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== npm ==="; npm --version 2>$null; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Firebase CLI ==="; firebase --version 2>$null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { Write-Output "NOT INSTALLED" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== FlutterFire CLI ==="; flutterfire --version 2>$null; if \($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0\) { Write-Output "NOT INSTALLED" }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Dart pub global ==="; $dart = "C:\\Users\\User\\Desktop\\Nova pasta\\flutter\\bin\\dart.bat"; & $dart pub global list 2>$null)

PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\src\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\dev\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "$env:USERPROFILE\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\Users\\User\\fvm\\flutter_sdk\\bin\\flutter.bat", "C:\\Users\\User\\Documents\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; $local = Get-Content "android\\local.properties" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_ -match "flutter.sdk" }; Write-Output "local.properties: $local")
PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; if \(Test-Path $adb\) { & $adb devices -l } else { Write-Output "ADB nao encontrado em: $adb" })

PowerShell(Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { $_.FriendlyName -match "LG|Android|ADB|K51" -or $_.Manufacturer -match "LG|Google" } | Select-Object Status, Class, FriendlyName, Manufacturer | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { $_.Status -eq "Error" -or $_.Status -eq "Unknown" -or $_.Problem -ne 0 } | Select-Object Status, Class, FriendlyName, Problem | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell($j = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.gradle\\caches\\journal-1"; if \(Test-Path $j\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $j; Write-Output "Journal removido: $j" } else { Write-Output "Journal nao existe" })

PowerShell($caches = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.gradle\\caches"; if \(Test-Path $caches\) { Write-Output "Tamanho antes:"; \(Get-ChildItem $caches -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object -Property Length -Sum\).Sum / 1MB; Write-Output "Apagando $caches ..."; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $caches -ErrorAction Continue; if \(Test-Path $caches\) { Write-Output "AVISO: alguns arquivos resistiram"; Get-ChildItem $caches -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName | Select-Object -First 10 } else { Write-Output "Cache apagado com sucesso" } } else { Write-Output "Cache nao existe" })

PowerShell(Get-Process -Name java,gradle,kotlin-daemon -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Matando PID $\($_.Id\) - $\($_.ProcessName\)"; Stop-Process -Id $_.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Write-Output "---"; Get-Process -Name java,gradle,kotlin-daemon -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName)

PowerShell(cmd /c "rmdir /S /Q `"$env:USERPROFILE\\.gradle\\caches`""; if \(Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.gradle\\caches"\) { Write-Output "AINDA EXISTE - restos:"; Get-ChildItem "$env:USERPROFILE\\.gradle\\caches" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20 FullName } else { Write-Output "OK - caches apagado completamente" })

PowerShell($paths = @\("android\\.gradle","android\\build","android\\app\\build","build",".dart_tool"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { cmd /c "rmdir /S /Q `"$p`""; if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FALHOU: $p" } else { Write-Output "OK: $p apagado" } } else { Write-Output "Skip \(nao existe\): $p" } })

PowerShell($apk = "build\\app\\outputs\\flutter-apk\\app-release.apk"; if \(Test-Path $apk\) { $f = Get-Item $apk; Write-Output "APK: $\($f.FullName\)"; Write-Output "Tamanho: $\([Math]::Round\($f.Length/1MB,2\)\) MB"; Write-Output "Modificado: $\($f.LastWriteTime\)" } else { Write-Output "APK NAO ENCONTRADO" })

PowerShell($f = Get-Command flutter -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($f\){$f.Source}else{Get-ChildItem -Path C:\\ -Filter flutter.bat -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Depth 4 | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName})

PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat","C:\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat","C:\\src\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat","$env:USERPROFILE\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat","C:\\tools\\flutter\\bin\\flutter.bat","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Pub\\Cache\\bin\\flutter.bat"\); foreach\($p in $paths\){ if\(Test-Path $p\){ $p } }; where.exe dart 2>$null)
